name: The Defect
description:
An automaton eternally modifying itself to survive.
Deploys Orb technology when it must fight.
description_zh:
一具不停改造自己来生存下去的自动机械。
在不得不战斗时，它会使用充能球科技来作战。

quotes.event_death_prevention: I must live on for my friends!
quotes.gold_monologue: [sine]This gold can be exchanged for parts...[/sine]
quotes.unlock_text: Play a single run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
quotes.cards_modifier_description: Defect cards will now appear in rewards and shops.

quotes_zh.event_death_prevention: 为了我的朋友们，我必须活下去！
quotes_zh.gold_monologue: [sine]这些金币可以用来交换零件……[/sine]
quotes_zh.unlock_text: 用[pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink]进行一局游戏来解锁这个角色。
quotes_zh.cards_modifier_description: 故障机器人的卡牌现在会出现在奖励和商店中。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: You’re a beautiful hunk of junk, you know that?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<3[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Still keeping at it, I see... Let’s see if we can upgrade ya!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
I’ve been holding on to your friend’s uhh... um.
Nevermind nevermind!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<Inquisitive beeps>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: My scrappy scrapper, forget I said all that!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...construct.. what...
....have you.. become...?[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...he.. can...
....fix.. you.. ...everything....[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...I.. can’t... ..make...
...you.. forget....[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<resolute beeping sounds>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...good....[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings?
Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<embarrassed chirp>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
What! Servant construct?! Still working!!
Why here? Why not at Factory??

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Shiny orbs! How work?
[jitter]Ouch!![/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Core broken? Neow use broken construct?
Manipulated?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<quietly beeps>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Architect fix you?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]Troubled automaton, looking for your friend?
Let me help...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]Do constructs dream?
Watch and copy me...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]I dreamt of your friend...
Father can restore [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: CONSTRUCT! NO WEAPONS!? HAVE THIS!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: ORBS ARE NOT WEAPONS!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: FIGHT ME, DEFECT!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]The Defect valiantly fights.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: ORBS [jitter]ARE[/jitter] WEAPONS!?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<greetings beep>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Not here to annoy me? What an [jitter][b]unusual[/b][/jitter] little construct...

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Now how silly would it be if he were unmade by one of his own?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Are you sure you want to be fixed up?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<inquisitive beep>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Well, if you’re really [jitter][b]certain[/b][/jitter].

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: <random garbled lines>

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Repair you? Make me.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: You’re back? Didn’t I dismantle you?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: <random garbled lines>

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Fix you? Fix your friend? Ridiculous.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: How do you keep coming back? Is this Neow’s doing?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: <random garbled lines>

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Foolish

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Broken one, let me [sine]perfect[/sine] you.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Do you find it strange that your fellow constructs want you dead?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: If you bring me the Architect’s heart, I will restore your [aqua]companion[/aqua].

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<fearful beeping>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: What’s more important? Your creator or your friend?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你这块大型垃圾还真是挺好看的，你知道吧？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<3[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 还在努力吶，我明白了……来看看能不能给你升个级呗！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
我其实一直留着你那位朋友的，呃……唔。
当我没说，当我没说！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<好奇的嘀嘀声>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我勇敢的小家伙，忘了我刚才说的话吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...构装体.. 你...
....变成.. 什么了...？[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<坚决的嘀嘀声>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...很好....[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
构装体也能够配得上我的赐福么？
过来吧，故障机器人。在所有自动机械里，你将成为最美。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 可怜的机器呀，如此残破不堪，来让我将你好好改善吧。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我通常不会喜欢建筑师的造物，但我承认，你让我有点喜欢上了。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<羞赧的鸣叫>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
什么！构装体仆人？！居然还在运作！！
为什么在这里？？为什么不在工厂？？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
闪亮的充能球！怎么运作的？
[jitter]啊呀！！[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
核心损坏？涅奥驱使着坏了的构装体？
是利用？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<安静的嘀嘀声>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 建筑师能修你？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]困扰的自动机械，在找你的朋友吗？
让我来帮忙……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]构装体会做梦吗？
看着我，模仿我……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]我梦见了你的朋友……
父亲可以将[aqua]缺陷[/aqua]复原……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]构装体！没有武器么！？收下这个！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]几个球球，算什么武器！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]故障机器人，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]故障机器人英勇地战斗了。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]球球[jitter]真是[/jitter]武器！？[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<问候的嘀嘀声>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 不是来这里烦扰我的吗？真是个[jitter][b]不同寻常[/b][/jitter]的小小构装体呢……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 要是他被自己的同类给毁了，那该多荒唐呀？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你确定想要被修好么？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<好奇的嘀嘀声>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 哎呀，要是你真的[jitter][b]确定[/b][/jitter]的话。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你在这里做什么？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: <随机混乱的词句>

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 修好你？凭什么。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你回来了？我不是把你拆解了吗？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: <随机混乱的词句>

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 修好你？还要修好你的朋友？胡言乱语。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你怎么还能一直回来？这是涅奥做的么？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: <随机混乱的词句>

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 愚蠢

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 破损的存在呀，让我把你变得[sine]完美[/sine]吧。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 为何你的构装体同胞们都想杀死你，你就不觉得奇怪么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 如果你把建筑师的心脏带给我，我就把你的[aqua]同伴[/aqua]复原。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]<恐惧的嘀嘀声>[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 何者更为重要？你的造主，还是你的朋友？

name: The Ironclad
description:
The last soldier of the Ironclads.
Crushes foes with sword and flame against his will.
description_zh:
铁甲军团最后的士兵。
并非出自自身的意愿，用刀剑与烈焰击溃敌人们。

quotes.gold_monologue: [sine]These riches can bolster my tribe's armory...[/sine]
quotes.aroma_principle: [sine][red]Pain is nothing. My enemies must die.[/red][/sine]
quotes.cards_modifier_description: Ironclad cards will now appear in rewards and shops.

quotes_zh.gold_monologue: [sine]这些财富可以充实部落的军库……[/sine]
quotes_zh.aroma_principle: [sine][red]疼痛算得了什么，我的敌人们必须死。[/red][/sine]
quotes_zh.cards_modifier_description: 铁甲战士的卡牌现在会出现在奖励和商店中。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
The flaming warrior has returned!
I’ve got just the thing for ya!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Good to see ya still kickin’ and bashin’ em heads in!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I’m still holding on to that heavy blade of yours... but I can’t find no one to restore it.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]The Ironclad stares at Darv.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Maybe the Architect knows somethin’.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..arise.. my.. warrior...
..time... to fight...again...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]..still.. lost.. to rage... good...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..remember.. the.. first..time
...you ..came...before me..[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]..so..furious...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...so..useful...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me.
Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
You return again my champion? How many times?
Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard!
Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]Do you remember how it feels to dream?
It is good to sleep...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]You must quell your flames.
Father can free you...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: IMPRESSIVE SWORD, WARRIOR! YOU CAN USE MORE WEAPONS!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: WEAPONS FOR THE WARRIOR! GRAB A WEAPON! LET’S FIGHT!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: FIGHT ME, IRONCLAD!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]The Ironclad fights Tanx.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: YEEES!! MIGHTY FIGHT, TAKE WEAPON!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: You [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] so pretty! Come in, come in!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Such a strong boy you are! Come and eat something.
Can’t [jitter][b]slaughter[/b][/jitter] on an empty stomach!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Ohh, Architect still alive? Kill him [jitter][b]quickly[/b][/jitter] would you?
I’ll be waiting right here!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: So the arch demon’s thrall has arrived?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
Enemy...
Kill...

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Cursed to fight forever, aren’t you?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Architect... arch... enemy!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Do you even know your name?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I pity you.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Kill...

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Return to the bottom, Ironclad.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Imagine seeing [sine]you[/sine] again after so long.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
[jitter][b]SACRED DEMON![/b][/jitter]
What have you done to me!?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Exactly what you bargained for.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Do the lost tribes weigh on you...?
[i][font_size=22]Vakuu howls with laughter.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: My puppet of puppets... why haven’t you killed the Architect yet?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: After I kill the Architect, I will kill [jitter][b]YOU![/b][/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[i][font_size=22][sine]Yawn[/sine][/font_size][/i]
I look forward to watching you fail.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
啊，冒火的战士回来啦！
我这儿有东西正适合你！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 看到你还活着四处砸人脑壳，感觉真不错啊！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我还留着你的那把重刃呢……但没能找到可以修好它的人。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]铁甲战士盯着达弗。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 或许建筑师知道些什么呢。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..起来吧.. 我的.. 战士...
..是时候... 继续...战斗了...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]..依旧.. 深陷.. 狂怒么.. 很好...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..记起.. 你.. 第一..次
...来到 ..我面前...的时候..[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]..那么..愤怒...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...那么..有用...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
啊，铁甲战士，终于来到了我的面前。
过来吧，我会赐予你我的力量。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 铁甲战士，铁甲战士……是我之前的赠礼还不够么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你又回来了么，我的勇士？这是多少次了？
过去的你，不是强大到可以消灭整个族群么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 一个铁甲战士！？怎么可能？？可怕，真可怕！！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 签下契约？为什么！？糟糕选择？对，大错误！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
祝愿你自己！！拼命祝愿！
瓦库坏，非常坏！建筑师能解放你？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]你心中有着如此多的愤怒。学习我吧，找到一些平静……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]你还记得做梦的感觉吗？
睡觉是件好事……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]你必须平息你的火焰。
父亲可以让你获得自由……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]好厉害的剑，战士！你该用上更多武器！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]战士该有武器！拿上一把！我们来战斗吧！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]铁甲战士，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]铁甲战士与坦克斯战斗了。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]好哇！！豪迈的一战，收下武器！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 啊呀，你[jitter][b]燃烧[/b][/jitter]得真漂亮！进来，进来吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你是个多么强壮的男孩啊！来，吃点东西吧。
空着肚子可没法[jitter][b]杀戮[/b][/jitter]！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
哦哦，建筑师还活着吗？那能不能麻烦你[jitter][b]快点[/b][/jitter]去杀了他呢？
我就在这里等着吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 是大恶魔的走狗来了么？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
敌人……
杀戮……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你被诅咒必须永远战斗，是吧？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 建筑师……最大……敌人！！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你是不是连自己的名字都不记得了？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我怜悯你。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 杀戮……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 回塔底去吧，铁甲战士。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 真没想到，过了这么久，居然还会看见[sine]你[/sine]。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
[jitter][b]神圣恶魔！[/b][/jitter]
你都对我做了什么！？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 正是你交易应得的哦。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
失去的那些部落们是否仍让你感到沉重……？
[i][font_size=22]瓦库大笑起来。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我傀儡中的傀儡呵……你为何还没有杀死建筑师？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我杀了建筑师之后，就会来杀了[jitter][b]你！[/b][/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[i][font_size=22][sine]哈欠[/sine][/font_size][/i]
我很期待看着你如何失败。

name: The Necrobinder
description:
A Spireborn lich who seeks revenge.
Calls upon her trusty left hand, [gold]Osty[/gold], in combat.
description_zh:
一位出生在尖塔的巫妖，正在寻求复仇。
战斗中会召唤她可靠的左手[gold]奥斯提[/gold]。

quotes.event_death_prevention: My friends won't make it without me.
quotes.gold_monologue: [sine]Maybe I can finally buy some shoes...[/sine]
quotes.aroma_principle: [sine][purple]They will be avenged... I will not falter...[/purple][/sine]
quotes.unlock_text: Play a single run with [orange]{Prerequisite}[/orange] to unlock this character.
quotes.cards_modifier_description: Necrobinder cards will now appear in rewards and shops.

quotes_zh.event_death_prevention: 我的朋友们可不能没有我。
quotes_zh.gold_monologue: [sine]或许我终于可以买几双鞋子了……[/sine]
quotes_zh.aroma_principle: [sine][purple]他们的仇一定要报……我不会动摇……[/purple][/sine]
quotes_zh.unlock_text: 用[orange]{Prerequisite}[/orange]进行一局游戏来解锁这个角色。
quotes_zh.cards_modifier_description: 亡灵契约师的卡牌现在会出现在奖励和商店中。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I can tell you’re a serious one. What can I do for ya missy?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Anything to help me kill a most loathsome man.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Very well then... have a gander!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Still on that warpath? I ain’t gonna stop ya!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: This book seems tied to ya, been around longer than you have.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: How did you come into possession of that?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]Scary[/sine] things have a way of ending up in my collection.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...we.... share... ..the same... ..goal....[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [jitter]HE KILLED ALL THAT I LOVE!![/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...my power..... is yours...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]He... still.. ....breathes...[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]Is... it.. ...even... possible...?[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]... [red]Architect[/red].... ..weakening....
..we.... stronger...[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Your guards are dead, rumors say you can bestow blessings for those who wish the Architect dead.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power.
Next time, don’t kill my guards.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: The Architect won’t be pleased to see that [sine]pet[/sine] of yours.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Do you mean Osty? He will be the one to deliver the final blow.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
I’m no puppet. There’s a man I must kill.
What can you do for me?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Killing bad!! Take this instead!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
My quest will only end when the Architect is no more.
Violence is inevitable.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]Such malice paints your heart.[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: We would share the same paint if you knew what’s befallen me.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]There is no peace on your path.
Take a part of me to ease your burdens...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]The one with the Hand returns.
Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]Killing [red]Father[/red] won’t bring peace.[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: You call that [jitter]thing[/jitter] your father!?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]We do not choose our family...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: WHAT A MIGHTY SCYTHE!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Yes, it’s special-made for vengeance.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: DOES THE HAND NEED A WEAPON!?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: FIGHT ME, OSTY!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: FIGHT ME, NECROBINDER!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]The Necrobinder and Osty scuffle with Tanx.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: MIGHTY TEAMWORK!! HAVE A WEAPON!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Now what’s a skeleton doing inside these walls?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
My aim is simple. Vengeance for my family.
I’ll reach the top and make him pay.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [jitter][b]Wonderful[/b][/jitter]!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Come in, come in! Let’s make your flames burn [jitter][b]brighter[/b][/jitter].

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Those flames around you remind me of something forbidden.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: What do you know?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I know who wrote that [jitter][b]book[/b][/jitter].

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE! ...and now I will kill YOU!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Vengeance is it? No thank you.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: You cannot change the past with anger.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE-

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I did what I must to maintain order.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Life

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: What...?! Die, monster!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: We both seek [sine]vengeance[/sine]. It will have a cost to pay.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I accept any cost. Every cost for his death.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I know where you got that [sine]Hand[/sine].

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: The Architect has gravely wounded us both.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Get on with it, demon. Show me your contracts.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Straight to business. Very well...

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 看得出来你比较严肃，能为你做点什么吗女士？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 任何能帮我杀死一个最可恶的人的东西。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 这样啊……那你看看吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 还在征战不休吶？我不拦着你哈！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 这本书看起来和你联系很紧密嘛，它可比你存在的时间长多了。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 你是怎么拿到它的？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]可怕[/sine]的东西总会兜兜转转来到我的收藏中。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [jitter]他杀死了我爱的一切！！[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...我的力量..... 是你的了...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]他... 依旧.. ....生存...[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]那... 真的.. ...可能... 吗...？[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]... [red]建筑师[/red].... ..逐渐虚弱....
..我们.... 变强...[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 你的护卫已经死了。传闻说，你会赐福给想要杀死建筑师的人。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
我喜欢有能力的人，所以我会把自己的力量分给你一部分。
下一次，可别再杀我的护卫了。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 法师若要战斗，自然需要上好的衣装和饰物。过来吧，亡灵契约师。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 建筑师见到你的[sine]宠物[/sine]，一定不会高兴的。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 你是指奥斯提么？我会让他来完成最后一击的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 死了？！没死！为何当傀儡？好大的手！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
我不是傀儡。有个人我必须要杀。
你能帮我点什么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 杀人不好！！带上这个吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 不死者！有好礼物给你！！暴力不好。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 不要暴力！拿点亮闪闪的吧……亮闪闪！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
只有当建筑师不复存在，我的使命才会结束。
暴力不可避免。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 建筑师不坏！或许聊聊？聊聊很好！！非常好！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]有如此的恶意涂满了你的心。[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 如果你知道我的遭遇，你的心也会被涂成相同的颜色。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]你的道路上没有安宁。
拿走我的一部分吧，让它减轻你的重负……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]带着手的人回来了。
痛苦的回忆。拿走我的力量然后离开吧……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]杀死[red]父亲[/red]不会带来安宁。[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 你说那个[jitter]东西[/jitter]是你的父亲！？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]我们无法选择自己的家人……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]多么强大的巨镰！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 是的，它是为复仇而特别打造的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]那只手，是否需要武器！？[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]奥斯提，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]亡灵契约师，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]亡灵契约师与奥斯提和坦克斯战作一团。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]了不起的团队合作！！收下一把武器吧！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 嗯，一具骷髅来到这个地方是要做什么呢？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
我的目标很单纯，我要为我的家人们复仇。
我会前往塔顶，让他付出代价。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [jitter][b]真是太棒了[/b][/jitter]！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 进来吧，进来！我们来让你的火焰燃烧得更[jitter][b]明亮[/b][/jitter]。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你周身的这些火焰，倒是让我想起了一样禁忌的东西。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 你知道些什么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我认得写[jitter][b]那本书[/b][/jitter]的家伙。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 建筑师！你杀死了我的父母，你杀死了我的朋友，你杀死了我的[b]生命[/b]！……所以现在，我要杀死[b]你[/b]！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 复仇是么？敬谢不敏。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 建筑师！你杀死了我的父母，你杀死了我的朋友，你杀死了我的——

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你无法用愤怒改变过去。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 建筑师！你杀死了我的父母，你杀死了我的朋友，你杀死了我的[b]生命[/b]——

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我只是为了维持秩序，做了我必须做的事情。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 建筑师！你杀死了我的父母，你杀死了我的朋友，你杀死了我的——

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 生命

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 哈……？！死吧，怪物！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我们都在寻求[sine]复仇[/sine]。当然，收获总要有代价。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我接受任何代价，只要能换来他的死亡。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我知道你的[sine]那只手[/sine]是从哪里来的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我们两个，都被建筑师伤得很痛。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 别多费唇舌了，恶魔。把你的契约给我看吧。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 开门见山吗，很好……

name: The Regent
description:
Heir to the Throne of Stars.
Wields cosmic powers but his minions do the work.
description_zh:
群星王座的继承人。
拥有宇宙的力量，但总是让他的仆从们去做各种事情。

quotes.event_death_prevention: I must live on to help my team!!
quotes.gold_monologue: [sine]I can commandeer an army of non-idiots...[/sine]
quotes.aroma_principle: [sine][orange]I am the next King of Stars...[/orange][/sine]
quotes.unlock_text: Play a single run with [green]{Prerequisite}[/green] to unlock this character.
quotes.cards_modifier_description: Regent cards will now appear in rewards and shops.

quotes_zh.event_death_prevention: 为了我的队伍，我必须活下去！！
quotes_zh.gold_monologue: [sine]我可以用这来征召一支不是白痴的军队……[/sine]
quotes_zh.unlock_text: 用[green]{Prerequisite}[/green]进行一局游戏来解锁这个角色。
quotes_zh.cards_modifier_description: 储君的卡牌现在会出现在奖励和商店中。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: What brings the likes of you up here? Wanna take a look at my collection?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I do enjoy fine wares...

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Back for more your highness?!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: To my new friend, do I have somethin’ for ya!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I’m listening!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
I’d give it but the Architect nabbed it from me!!
Help a buddy out! Do me a favor will ya?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Oversized blue creature, I am the future [orange]King[/orange]!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..cute...
...you... will see.. ..me... ...again....[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...again..?[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [jitter]Why can’t I win?![/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...receive.. this... ..blessing...[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: ...yes, thank you Neow.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I seek audience with Nonupeipe!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands!
Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Royal blessings for royal visitors.
Servants! Fetch some tea for us.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
Fear not! I, the Regent, will put an end to the madness!
But first, tea!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Traveller! From space!? Where in space?
How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]The Regent monologues for hours.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Exciting! Impressive!! More! More!!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
More stories! Found these for you!
Now tell more story!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
My number one fan! Orobas, friend!
Lovely to see you’re still alive!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Stories?!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Of course of course... but have you found any trinkets for me?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
Hello! I am the Regent.
Hellooo?? [jitter]HELLO!?[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]Quiet down now.
Take a part of me and be on your way...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
I’m back! Ah, you’re asleep of course.
Let’s see here...

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Why do you give yourself away?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]When you return, I will be replenished anew.
That’s what sleep does...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: ORANGE!? HOW IS THIS BEING ORANGE!??

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: All know that orange is the most regal color!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: INCREDIBLE! SO MIGHTY!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: ORANGE ONE!! CHOOSE A MIGHTY WEAPON!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: FIGHT ME, REGENT!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: No! We fought last time I was here!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: FIGHT ME AGAIN!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Oh my, what an [jitter][b]exotic[/b][/jitter] visitor! Who might you be, sweetie?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I’m no sweetie! Address me with respect, giant... thing-person!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Where are my manners?
[i][font_size=22]Tezcatara cackles with delight.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
You and your friends are back again?
I’ve made [jitter][b]treats[/b][/jitter] for you!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Welcome back regal boy! Looks like you’re doing [jitter][b]great[/b][/jitter] out there.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Yes of course! Just some minor setbacks at the upper levels... like dying.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: We all need to learn from our mistakes.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I’ve arrived! You there, commoner! Is this the top?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I need quiet...

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I’ll teach you some manners!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I’ve arrived again!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: The loud fool returns?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I’m neither loud nor a fool! Face me!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I’ve had enough of your poor manners!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Something we can both agree on.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Let’s dance!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: A being from the stars? Within these accursed walls?

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: Do you know of me?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Yes, I think we can help each other.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: More of my power can be yours for a small price.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: I don’t think these deals are good. I’m not feeling great.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
You read the contracts thoroughly have you not?
You have signed them with full intent and responsibility no?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Are you not going to fulfill your end of the bargain?
How about another contract? Isn’t that better?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你这样的人怎么会来这儿呀？想不想来看看我的收藏呀？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我确实喜欢赏鉴高品质的东西……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 好耶！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 又来看更多吗，殿下？！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我的新朋友，我可有好东西给你呀！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我在听！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
我很想给你，但东西已经被建筑师抢走了！！
那你帮我这个好伙计一个忙呗！怎么样？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 巨大蓝色生物，我可是未来的[orange]王[/orange]！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...又一次..？[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [jitter]为什么我赢不了？！[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]...收下.. 这份... ..赐福...[/sine]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: ……好的，谢谢你，涅奥。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我要来见诺奴佩普！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你从遥远的地方带来了这么华美的袍子么！
来，让你的仆从们把你带过来一点，我会给你赐福的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
王室的访客，该有王室的赐福。
仆人们！为我们倒点茶来。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 建筑师发了疯！只有一位高贵的勇士能拯救我们于此危难了……

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
无需担心！我，储君，将会终止这场疯狂！
但是首先，喝茶！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
旅行者！太空来的！？太空哪里？
怎么从太空来？脑袋尖尖！还有小小伙伴！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]储君独自说了几个小时。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 真有趣！真厉害！！再说说！再说说！！！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
更多故事！给你找了这些东西！
所以快来说更多故事！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
我的头号粉丝！欧洛巴斯，好朋友！
看到你还活着真是不错！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 故事？！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 当然当然……不过你有给我找到更多饰品么？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
你好！我是储君。
你好？？[jitter]你好！？[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]安静点吧。
拿走我的一部分，然后上路吧……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text:
我回来了！啊，你当然在睡觉。
让我看看这里……

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 你为什么要把自己的肉体送给别人？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [thinky_dots]既然我有大量的血肉，为什么不送呢？[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]当你再次归来时，我也会焕然一新。
那就是睡眠的作用……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]橙色！？这个存在为何会是橙色！？？[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 众所周知，橙色是最符合帝王的颜色！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]了不起！真是强大！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]橙色的！！选一把强大的武器吧！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]储君，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 不要！上次我来这里我们已经战斗过了！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]再来与我战斗啊！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 啊呀呀，真是位[sine]稀奇[/sine]的访客！你是哪位呀，亲爱的？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我不是什么亲爱的！对我说话得尊重一点，巨大的……东西人类！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
那我真是礼数不周啦？
[i][font_size=22]特兹卡塔拉高兴地咯咯笑。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你和你的伙伴们又回来啦？
我给你们做了好些[jitter][b]点心[/b][/jitter]哦！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 欢迎回来，王室男孩！看起来你在外头表现得[jitter][b]很棒[/b][/jitter]呢。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 那当然了！只是在上层遇到了一些小小挫折……比如死掉。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 所有人都是从错误中吸取经验的吶。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我终于到达了！喂，那边的平民！这里就是塔顶么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我需要安静……

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 看来我需要教你一点礼数！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我又到这里了！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 聒噪的愚者又来了么？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我既不聒噪，也不是愚者！你快来面对着我！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我已经受够了你的无礼了！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 这一点，我们倒是意见一致。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 来起舞吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 居然是一个星间来客？在这被诅咒的墙内？

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 你知道我么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 是啊，我觉得我们可以互相帮助。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 只需付出小小代价，你就可以拥有我的更多力量。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: 我觉得这些条件都不怎么样，我感觉很不好。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你有好好完整地阅读过契约吧？
你是在完全知情、主动、而且愿意接受所有相关责任的条件下签下的名字对吧？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你不打算完成交易里自己的那一半么？
那再来一份契约怎么样？是不是更好一些？

name: The Silent
description:
A huntress from outside the Spire.
Ready to stab and poison anything in her way.
description_zh:
一位来自尖塔之外的女猎手。
随时准备刀刺与毒杀任何拦路者。

quotes.event_death_prevention: Must live on to hunt another day...
quotes.gold_monologue: [sine]My sisters would be proud of these riches...[/sine]
quotes.unlock_text: Play a single run to unlock this character.
quotes.cards_modifier_description: Silent cards will now appear in rewards and shops.

quotes_zh.gold_monologue: [sine]我的姐妹们一定会为这些财富感到骄傲……[/sine]
quotes_zh.unlock_text: 进行一局游戏来解锁这个角色。
quotes_zh.cards_modifier_description: 静默猎手的卡牌现在会出现在奖励和商店中。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Back in the Spire for you too huh?
Can’t resist those shinies right?!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I’ll trade ya somethin’ nice for that trophy you got there!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Pity ya don’t remember all my generosity!
Yeah yeah, you know how Neow is...

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Well! Let’s get you equipped for that final showdown or whatevah!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...returned.. from... outside?
..knew... you’d... be back...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...your..
 ...trophy.. awaits...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]..both...know..agony..of..family...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..still...seeking..approval...?
...[jitter]FOOLISH[/jitter]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
A little thief has snuck into my domain?
Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]The Silent steps out of the shadows...[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire?
Approach and don these blessings.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
What took your first life? Did Neow [sine]find[/sine] you?
A shame you don’t speak.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Infection...? [jitter]BLIGHT!?[/jitter] Take and go!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters!
Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]Murderous creature, no need for violence here.
Have part of me and find peace...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me...
Whatever grants you comfort...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]You’ve poisoned me...?
What is this going to...? zZZzz...[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: A HUNTRESS! I WILL SHARPEN YOUR CLAW!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: WHY DAGGERS!! UNMIGHTY!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: FIGHT ME, SILENT!!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]The Silent escapes, stealing a weapon on the way.[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: WHERE DID YOU GO!!!

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Come closer, quiet one. I can’t see well...

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: You can [jitter][b]trust[/b][/jitter] me.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Such a nasty [jitter][b]sickness[/b][/jitter] you have. Let’s take care of you.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: I’ve met your sisters, you know? Such lovely girls they are.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Oh dear... you haven’t been [jitter][b]fighting[/b][/jitter] have you?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Not even an introduction?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Where did you come from?
What are you after?

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[jitter]Hrrgh![/jitter]
[jitter][red]DIE!![/red][/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
Annoying wretch!
[jitter]BE GONE!![/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: Killer.

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: This won’t [jitter]end[/jitter] well for you.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]Vakuu displays his various contracts to the Silent[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: The Architect is not enough, kill your sisters too!

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: No need for words, we are the same.

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你也回高塔里来啦，嗯？
还是抵抗不住亮闪闪的东西的诱惑，是吧？！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你的那个战利品，我有好东西和你交换！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
可惜你不记得我过去的慷慨！
是啦是啦，你也知道涅奥就是这样……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 好吧！那我们就给你整点儿适合最终决战之类的装备吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...从.. 外面... 回来了么？
..我知道... 你会... 回来...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...你的..
 ...猎物.. 在等待...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]..两个...都知道..家族..的..痛苦...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..还在...寻找..认同...？
...[jitter]愚蠢[/jitter]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
一个小小的窃贼溜进了我的领域么？
别以为我看不见你啊？出来吧！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]静默猎手从阴影中走了出来……[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
猎手啊，是什么让你回到了高塔？
过来吧，穿戴上这些赐福。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我为你准备了礼物，刺客，不用害羞。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 在她的傀儡之中，属你最让我吃惊。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
是什么夺走了你的第一次生命？是涅奥[sine]找到[/sine]你的么？
真可惜啊，你不说话。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 感染……？[jitter]荒疫！？[/jitter]拿了东西就走吧！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 不传染？很快要死？建筑师能帮你？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
姐妹们在哪里？吓人又很凶的姐妹们！
做个好人！别像姐妹们那样！！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]杀戮的生物，这里不需要暴力。
拿走我的一部分，寻找安宁吧……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]猎取战利品？当然，拿走我的一部分吧……
只有你安心就好……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]你给我下了毒……？
那能有什么作用呢……？zZZzz……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]一个猎手！我会把你细小的利爪磨得更利！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]为何用匕首！！它不强大！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]静默猎手，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]静默猎手逃离了战斗，沿途偷走了一把武器。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]你去了哪里！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 过来一点，安静的小家伙。我的眼神可不太好使啦……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你可以[jitter][b]信任[/b][/jitter]我的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你得了很严重的[jitter][b]疾病[/b][/jitter]呢。让我来照顾你吧。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我也见过你的姐妹们，你知道吧？都是很可爱的女孩子呢。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 哎呀亲爱的……你不会一直在都[jitter][b]战斗[/b][/jitter]吧？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 甚至都没有一句自我介绍么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你从何而来？
所寻何物？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[jitter]呵啊！[/jitter]
[jitter][red]死吧！！[/red][/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
烦人的混蛋！
[jitter]消失吧！！[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 杀人者。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你是不会有[jitter]好下场[/jitter]的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]瓦库向静默猎手展示着他的各种契约。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 建筑师还不够，把你的姐妹们也杀了吧！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 无需言语，我们两个是一样的。
